sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Moeve and ArcelorMittal Sign Largest Energy Savings Certificate Agreement in Spain - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Moeve and ArcelorMittal have signed Spain's largest Energy Savings Certificate (CAE) agreement, representing 2.1 TWh of annual energy savings, which is ten times larger than the previous record. This deal will help ArcelorMittal's decarbonization efforts for its Gijon long products unit, including the investment in a new electric arc furnace, and is expected to cut over 5% of Asturias's final energy consumption and reduce CO2 emissions by up to one million metric tons. The agreement highlights the growing importance of CAEs in driving industrial energy transition and decarbonization in Spain.

feed.title: RBC Capital Maintains MPLX LP(MPLX.US) With Buy Rating, Maintains Target Price $60
feed.summary: RBC Capital has reiterated its Buy rating for MPLX LP (MPLX.US), maintaining a target price of $60. This reflects their continued positive outlook on the company's financial performance and market position.

feed.title: SLB Stock Rises on Earnings Beat as Strong Activity Offsets Middle East Disruption
feed.summary: SLB's stock rose after the oilfield services company exceeded Wall Street's expectations for its second-quarter earnings. Strong offshore drilling activity outside the Middle East helped to offset disruptions in that region. This performance led to a positive market reaction for SLB shares.

feed.title: Form 4 Franklin Resources Inc For: 24 July By Investing.com
feed.summary: This article from Investing.com reports the filing of a Form 4 for Franklin Resources Inc. on July 24. A Form 4 is a document that must be filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) whenever there is a change in the ownership of company stock by company insiders. The article also provides Franklin Resources' stock symbol (BEN) and its current performance (-0.28%).

feed.title: CoStar Group (CSGP) Could Be 39% Undervalued After Its CFO Change
feed.summary: CoStar Group (CSGP) recently appointed Robin Rossmann as its new CFO, effective July 31, 2026, which has highlighted the company's financial leadership and capital allocation strategies. Despite significant share price declines over the past year, a popular valuation narrative suggests CSGP is 39% undervalued, with a fair value of $44.45 per share, based on expectations of future growth and richer margins. However, concerns remain regarding Homes.com adoption and intense market competition, while the stock's P/S ratio compared to industry averages presents mixed signals for investors.

feed.title: Equinix (EQIX) Could Be 14% Below Fair Value Following Q2 Earnings Focus
feed.summary: Equinix (EQIX) is heading into its Q2 2026 earnings release seemingly undervalued by 13.7% according to analyst narratives, which set a fair value of $1,197.11 against its current price of $1,033.55. However, its high P/E ratio of 71.7x compared to peers' 31x suggests investors are already paying a premium. The company's performance is closely tied to demand for AI and digital transformation.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble (PG) Could Be 23% Undervalued On Earnings Caution
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble (PG) is experiencing caution among analysts ahead of its July 29th earnings report, with expectations of declining EPS despite sales growth. While one narrative suggests an overvalued fair price of $121.06, Simply Wall St's DCF model indicates a fair value of $191.89, suggesting the stock could be 23.4% undervalued. Investors are advised to review the full data due to these mixed signals.

feed.title: RBC Lowers Price Target on Molina Healthcare to $218 From $248, Keeps Sector Perform Rating
feed.summary: RBC has lowered its price target for Molina Healthcare (MOH) to $218 from $248, while maintaining a Sector Perform rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst news of Molina Healthcare sharply cutting its Obamacare business due to rising costs, despite lifting its annual profit forecast. The article also mentions recent Q2 earnings results and other analyst adjustments for the company.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (HCA) HCA Healthcare, Inc. Reports Q2 Revenue $20.23B, vs. FactSet Est of $19.77B
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare, Inc. announced its second-quarter revenue reached $20.23 billion, surpassing FactSet's estimate of $19.77 billion. The company also posted Q2 adjusted EPS of $7.59 per share, exceeding FactSet's estimate of $7.56. Additionally, HCA Healthcare provided guidance, expecting its 2026 revenue to range from $77.00 billion to $79.50 billion and EPS to be between $28.70 and $30.50.

feed.title: SBA Communications (NASDAQ: SBAC) prices new notes and secures $2.5B credit facility
feed.summary: SBA Communications has completed a significant refinancing of its capital structure, issuing $3.5 billion in new senior unsecured notes with maturities in 2030, 2031, and 2033, and establishing a new $2.5 billion senior unsecured revolving credit facility. The proceeds from the note offering were primarily used to repay existing secured term loans and revolving credit facilities, with remaining funds allocated for general corporate purposes. The new financial arrangements feature specific leverage covenants and define conditions for redemption and change-of-control events.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare cites uninsured volume in ~$400M pretax hit
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare reported its second-quarter 2026 results, showing an 8.7% increase in revenues to $20.230 billion but a slight increase in net income attributable to HCA Healthcare, Inc. of 2.8% to $1.699 billion. The company attributes an approximate $400 million unfavorable impact on income before income taxes to a payer mix shift, primarily due to an increase in uninsured patients after losing coverage on health insurance exchanges. HCA Healthcare also updated its 2026 guidance, lowering its net income and diluted EPS projections, while increasing its estimate for the negative impact from health insurance exchanges to $1.0 billion - $1.2 billion.

feed.title: NextEra Energy executives to discuss Q2 results in webcast
feed.summary: NextEra Energy (NYSE: NEE) has announced that its second-quarter 2026 financial results are now available on its website. Senior management will review these results during a live, listen-only webcast commencing at 9 a.m. ET today, with a replay accessible for 90 days. The announcement provided no financial figures but noted the historical mixed market reaction to such earnings posts.

feed.title: NextEra Energy second-quarter 2026 financial results available on company's website
feed.summary: NextEra Energy, Inc. has announced that its second-quarter 2026 financial results are now available on the company's website. A live webcast presentation by senior management discussing these results will begin at 9 a.m. ET today, with a replay available for 90 days. NextEra Energy is North America's largest electric power and energy infrastructure company, owning Florida Power & Light Company and NextEra Energy Resources, LLC.

feed.title: Kimberly-Clark stock trades steadily as margins and cash flow support dividend appeal
feed.summary: Kimberly-Clark's stock demonstrates stability fueled by consistent demand for its tissue and personal care products, alongside strengthened margins and robust cash generation. The company, which reported $20.4 billion in net sales for 2023 and an annual dividend of approximately $4.72 per share, benefits from strategic pricing, cost savings, and innovation, particularly in its growing personal care segment. Investors are focused on the company's ability to maintain profitability and cash returns amid evolving market dynamics.

feed.title: KeyCorp Has Negative Estimate for Southern Q3 Earnings
feed.summary: KeyCorp has reduced its Q3 2026 EPS estimate for Southern (NYSE:SO) from $1.71 to $1.66, maintaining an "Underweight" rating and a $79 price target. Despite this cautious outlook, Southern's previous quarterly results exceeded expectations, with reported EPS of $1.32 against an estimated $1.21 and revenues of $8.40 billion, surpassing the $8.07 billion estimate. The stock currently holds a "Hold" consensus rating from analysts, trading at $96.53 with a 3.1% dividend yield.

feed.title: Q2 Earnings Forecast for Xcel Energy Issued By KeyCorp
feed.summary: KeyCorp initiated its Q2 2026 earnings per share estimate for Xcel Energy (NASDAQ:XEL) at $0.78, maintaining an "Overweight" rating. The power utility company has a consensus "Buy" rating from analysts with an average price target of $92.65, despite recent target trims by some firms. Xcel Energy (XEL) recently matched Q1 earnings estimates at $0.91 per share and paid a quarterly dividend of $0.5925.

feed.title: Q2 Earnings Forecast for Sempra Energy Issued By KeyCorp
feed.summary: KeyCorp initiated new earnings estimates for Sempra Energy, forecasting Q2 2026 EPS of $1.05 and full-year 2026 EPS of $5.07, with long-term estimates reaching $6.46 by FY2029. Sempra's Q1 results were in line with EPS expectations but revenue fell below estimates, though the company reaffirmed its FY2026 and FY2027 guidance. Analyst sentiment remains largely positive, holding a "Moderate Buy" consensus and an average price target of $104.23 despite recent rating adjustments.

feed.title: KeyCorp Issues Negative Forecast for NiSource Earnings
feed.summary: KeyCorp has lowered its Q2 2026 EPS estimate for NiSource (NYSE: NI) to $0.14 from $0.17, while maintaining an "Overweight" rating and a $50 price target. Despite this, other analysts generally retain a constructive view, giving NiSource a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $50.30. NiSource shares recently saw a 0.3% increase to $46.71 and the company reaffirmed its FY 2026 EPS guidance of $2.02 to $2.07, also declaring a quarterly dividend of $0.30.

feed.title: CarMax stock soars 64% after InvestingPro Fair Value call By Investing.com
feed.summary: CarMax (NYSE:KMX) stock has soared 64.25% in eight months after an InvestingPro Fair Value analysis on November 8, 2025, identified it as significantly undervalued. The analysis, which combines multiple valuation methodologies, accurately predicted the stock's recovery despite prior operational challenges and declines. This success story highlights InvestingPro's ability to help investors identify mispriced opportunities and make informed investment decisions.

feed.title: TransDigm Group Incorporated (NYSE: TDG) appoints Irina Krasik to board
feed.summary: TransDigm Group Incorporated (NYSE: TDG) has appointed Irina Krasik to its Board of Directors, effective July 22, 2026. Ms. Krasik, a Managing Director at Stellex Capital Management, brings extensive experience in mergers and acquisitions, investing, corporate strategy, and governance. She will receive compensation under the company's standard non-employee director program and currently serves on several private-company boards.

feed.title: How Safe Is CVS Health’s Dividend?
feed.summary: CVS Health's dividend appears safe, backed by robust free cash flow largely exceeding its annual payout, despite 11 consecutive quarters without an increase. Key risks include a leveraged balance sheet from the Aetna acquisition and recent insider selling. The company has shown strong earnings momentum, with its Q1 2026 adjusted EPS significantly surpassing consensus, yet investors should monitor the medical cost trend, PBM regulation, and interest expenses.

feed.title: SLB Announces Second-Quarter 2026 Results
feed.summary: SLB announced its second-quarter 2026 results, reporting revenue of $8.97 billion, a 3% sequential and 5% year-on-year increase. GAAP EPS was $0.52, and adjusted EBITDA reached $1.90 billion, rising 7% sequentially. The company highlighted strong sequential growth in international markets, driven by offshore activity and a rebound in U.S. unconventionals, which largely offset disruptions in the Middle East.

feed.title: Travelers Draws Wave of Bears as Stock Eyes Best Year Since 2000
feed.summary: Travelers Companies Inc. is experiencing its best stock performance in over 25 years, with shares up 30% this year and trading at a record high. Despite this strong showing, Wall Street analysts have issued at least six downgrades this month, suggesting concerns that the stock's gains may have peaked. This creates a divergence between the stock's current success and analyst sentiment.

feed.title: Why T-Mobile Stock Dropped 11% Despite a Q2 Earnings Beat
feed.summary: T-Mobile's stock dropped 11% despite beating Q2 earnings estimates on key profit metrics, primarily due to a warning about elevated Q3 net postpaid account churn. Management attributes this temporary churn to a strategic rate plan modernization, which they expect will lead to long-term pricing power and customer lifetime value improvements through 2027. TIKR's model projects a significant 80% return for TMUS stock by 2030, based on expanding margins, disciplined capital return, and anticipated recovery from the current strategic reset.

feed.title: General Mills Inc. stock underperforms Thursday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: Shares of General Mills Inc. (GIS) fell 3.68% on Thursday, closing at $35.55, significantly underperforming the broader market. This marked the stock's fifth consecutive day of losses, contrasting with declines of 1.21% for the S&P 500 Index and 0.97% for the Dow Jones Industrial Average.

feed.title: Verizon’s stock rises as earnings show the company is no longer a ‘hunting ground’
feed.summary: Verizon's stock is rising after the company reported better-than-expected second-quarter earnings, including 184,000 postpaid phone net additions, surpassing the FactSet consensus. This performance marks a significant improvement from the previous year, indicating a new era for Verizon under its current leadership team. The company is also increasing its financial forecasts, suggesting accelerating growth in mobility and broadband service revenue.

feed.title: ONEOK stock trades near record territory as NGL earnings grow and Magellan merger reshapes the business
feed.summary: ONEOK Inc. (OKE) stock is trading near its highs, driven by strong natural gas liquids (NGL) earnings and the successful integration of its Magellan Midstream Partners acquisition in September 2023. The merger diversified ONEOK's asset base to include crude and refined products pipelines, significantly boosting its cash flow and market capitalization to over $40 billion. The company maintains a strong dividend, with an annualized payout above $4 per share, underpinned by robust earnings and expected synergies from the merger.

feed.title: Bernstein Adjusts PT on Thermo Fisher Scientific to $575 From $520, Maintains Market Perform Rating
feed.summary: Bernstein has increased its price target for Thermo Fisher Scientific to $575 from $520, while maintaining a Market Perform rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook from the analyst firm for the scientific equipment company. The news comes amid several other analyst updates for Thermo Fisher Scientific, indicating active re-evaluation of its stock.

feed.title: MBI stock edges higher as earnings and capital metrics stay in focus
feed.summary: MBIA, Inc. (MBI) stock is currently influenced by its latest earnings and balance-sheet figures, with the company's financial guarantees and insurance-linked risk management business defining its investment case. The key metrics for evaluating MBI are capital strength, loss development, and book value, rather than top-line growth. Investors should monitor the latest reported leverage, liquidity, and net income, as well as capital position, earnings trends, and reserve development compared to prior periods.

feed.title: How Vanguard Primecap Turned a Rough Stretch Into a Historic Rally
feed.summary: Vanguard Primecap, despite a challenging period up to 2023, has achieved a historic rally since early 2024, driven by strategic investments in semiconductors like Micron, KLA, and Intel. The fund's unique multi-manager approach, long-tenured team, and focus on out-of-favor companies with strong fundamentals have contributed to its outstanding long-term performance, significantly outpacing the S&P 500 and its large-blend category peers. Even with an upcoming manager retirement, the diversified structure is expected to ensure a smooth transition and continued success.

feed.title: Home Depot parking lot surveillance class action lawsuit: What posts get right, wrong
feed.summary: A class action lawsuit alleges Home Depot illegally surveilled California customers' vehicles using Flock camera technology, storing data in a law enforcement-accessible database. While the lawsuit is authentic and focuses on tracking vehicles and license plates, social media claims about facial recognition and a maximum $2,500 payout are false; Flock states its products lack facial recognition, and the lawsuit cites a minimum of $2,500 per individual under California privacy law.

feed.title: United Airlines stock steadies as revenue growth offsets higher costs
feed.summary: United Airlines stock reflects a balance between robust post-pandemic demand and increasing operating costs. While the company has seen multi-billion dollar revenue growth due to increased passenger volumes, its operating income and margins are pressured by higher fuel prices and labor expenses. Investors are watching how United Airlines manages costs and maintains network reliability amidst these dynamics, as its stock performance is influenced by revenue growth, operating costs, fuel price volatility, and macroeconomic indicators.

feed.title: Martin Marietta stock trades near highs as aggregates demand supports earnings
feed.summary: Martin Marietta Materials (MLM) stock is trading near its highs, supported by strong demand for aggregates and cement across key US regions. The company reported significant revenue and earnings growth in fiscal 2024, driven by increased shipments, favorable pricing, and disciplined cost control. Its robust cash flow, manageable debt, and increasing dividends contribute to a balanced total-return profile, with market capitalization reflecting investor confidence in sustained infrastructure and construction spending.

feed.title: American Express Earnings Surpass Expectations as Card Spending Increases 9%
feed.summary: American Express reported better-than-expected second-quarter profits, driven by a 9% increase in card spending from its affluent cardholder base. Despite the positive earnings, the company's stock fell. These results offer insight into the spending habits of high-income individuals and corporations.

feed.title: Ross Stores stock trades steadily as discount chain builds on stronger sales and margins
feed.summary: Ross Stores (NASDAQ: ROST) stock reflects the off-price retailer's improved sales and profitability, with investors watching how higher traffic and tighter cost control support earnings and cash returns. The company reported a 15% increase in net sales and a 25% rise in net income and EPS in fiscal 2023, driven by higher customer traffic, expanding margins, and effective cost management. Ross Stores continues to focus on store expansion, merchandise differentiation, and shareholder returns through dividends and share repurchases, maintaining a strong competitive position in the off-price retail market.

feed.title: Verizon Delivers Record 2Q26 Results as Strategic Transformation Ignites Accelerated Growth
feed.summary: Verizon Communications Inc. announced exceptional second-quarter 2026 financial and operational results, demonstrating strong growth due to its customer-first strategic transformation. The company achieved record-high adjusted EBITDA and adjusted EBITDA margins, driven by increased mobility and broadband service revenue, significant subscriber additions, and improved cash flow. Verizon raised its full-year guidance for several key metrics and expanded its share buyback target, signaling continued confidence in its strategic direction.

feed.title: No food court, samples or toilet paper. Just gas at a California Costco
feed.summary: Costco is expanding its business model by opening gas-only locations, with the first already operating in Mission Viejo, California, featuring 40 gas stations for members. Another gas-only site is planned for Honolulu in 2027. This strategy aims to capitalize on consumer demand for cheaper gas, a trend that significantly boosted Costco's gas volume sales in the third quarter of 2026.

feed.title: MannKind closes $50M financing, wins FDA nod for Furoscix auto-injector
feed.summary: MannKind (Nasdaq:MNKD) has announced it secured $50 million in a private placement and received FDA approval for its Furoscix ReadyFlow auto-injector. Frazier Life Sciences led the financing, which is expected to close today, July 24. The proceeds will be used for general corporate purposes, including a $45 million contingent value rights payment triggered by the FDA approval.

feed.title: Verizon Delivers Record 2Q26 Results as Strategic Transformation Ignites Accelerated Growth
feed.summary: Verizon Communications Inc. announced exceptional second-quarter 2026 financial and operational results, demonstrating strong growth due to its customer-first strategic transformation. The company achieved significant increases in mobility and broadband service revenue, postpaid phone net additions, and free cash flow, leading to raised full-year guidance for the second consecutive quarter. Verizon also expanded its share buyback target to up to $4.5 billion, driven by improved operational discipline and unit economics.

feed.title: Steris stock rises as margins and cash flow stay central
feed.summary: Steris stock is influenced by its latest reported margins, cash flow, and market valuation, which investors use to assess the company's financial performance. While the article notes a rising trend in the healthcare sector, specific current market quotes for Steris stock are not available in the provided search results. Key metrics for evaluating Steris, known for sterilization systems and surgical support, include revenue growth, operating margin, and free cash flow.

feed.title: MannKind Announces $50 Million Private Placement
feed.summary: MannKind Corporation announced a private placement totaling $50 million, led by Frazier Life Sciences. The funding will be used for general corporate purposes, including a $45 million contingent value rights payment triggered by the recent FDA approval of Furoscix ReadyFlow™. The company is selling common stock and pre-funded warrants to institutional investors at $3.89 per share and $3.88 per pre-funded warrant, respectively.

feed.title: Edison International stock trades steadily as earnings and wildfire risk management shape investor focus
feed.summary: Edison International (EIX) stock reflects a balance between regulated utility earnings and managing California wildfire risks. The company reported solid financial results for fiscal 2024, with net income of approximately $1.86 billion and operating revenue of $16.0 billion, a 3.9% increase year-on-year. Significant capital investments were made in grid hardening and wildfire mitigation, totaling $5.8 billion, showcasing the company's commitment to enhancing resilience while maintaining a steady dividend payout of $1.25 per share.

feed.title: SoundHound AI Receives Final Regulatory Clearance for LivePerson Acquisition
feed.summary: SoundHound AI, Inc. announced that it has received final regulatory clearance for its acquisition of LivePerson. This clearance marks a significant step forward for SoundHound AI's strategic growth. The acquisition is expected to bolster SoundHound AI's conversational intelligence offerings.

feed.title: Centene stock trades with earnings pressure and Medicaid shifts
feed.summary: Centene Corp. (US15133V1035) is facing earnings pressure due to Medicaid redeterminations, exchange membership, and recent operating metrics. The article emphasizes that for investors, the relationship between growth and margins is crucial, as even minor shifts in medical loss ratio or enrollment mix can significantly impact earnings. The company's core business spans Medicaid, Medicare, and marketplace plans, making shifts in utilization or eligibility rules directly relevant to its financial outlook.

feed.title: Inceptionr LLC Has $2.19 Million Stock Holdings in Packaging Corporation of America $PKG
feed.summary: Inceptionr LLC significantly increased its stake in Packaging Corporation of America (NYSE:PKG) by 676.8% in the first quarter, now holding 10,324 shares valued at $2.19 million, making it their fifth-largest position. Other hedge funds also adjusted their holdings in PKG. The company recently reported beating Q2 profit estimates with adjusted EPS of $2.35 and revenue of $2.49 billion, but reiterated Q3 EPS guidance slightly below consensus.
